description: Curated catalog of popular MCP servers with multi-transport declarations

servers.name: github-mcp
servers.description: GitHub repository management, issues, PRs, and actions

transports.description: Official MCP server via NPX
Containerized (community image)

servers.name: gitlab-mcp
servers.description: GitLab project management, merge requests, and CI/CD

transports.description: Official GitLab MCP server via NPX

servers.description: File system read/write operations with configurable access paths

transports.description: Official filesystem MCP server via NPX

transports.description: Official SQLite MCP server via NPX

transports.description: Official Playwright MCP server via NPX
Microsoft Playwright container

servers.name: fetch
servers.description: Web content fetching and HTTP request execution

transports.description: Official Fetch MCP server via UVX (Python)

servers.description: Web search via Brave Search API

transports.description: Official Brave Search MCP server via NPX

servers.name: discord
servers.description: Discord messaging and server management

transports.description: Discord MCP server via NPX

servers.name: notion
servers.description: Notion workspace, pages, databases, and content management

servers.name: linear
servers.description: Linear project management, issues, and team workflows

transports.description: Linear MCP server via NPX

servers.name: airtable

transports.description: Airtable MCP server via NPX

servers.name: google-drive

transports.description: Google Drive MCP server via NPX

servers.name: memory
servers.description: Knowledge graph memory server (memini-ai compatible)

servers.name: sequential-thinking

servers.name: markitdown
servers.description: Convert documents and files to Markdown

transports.description: MarkItDown MCP server via UVX (Python)
Local binary (pip install markitdown-mcp)

_provenance: Package names follow @modelcontextprotocol/server-* for npx, mcp-* or mcp-server-* for uvx. Docker images assumed mcp/<name>. Official MCP servers use @modelcontextprotocol/* scope. Community servers use mcp-server-* prefix.
